name: 南院·舞台
description: 秋瑟园南院搭建的戏剧舞台，有盖台布的桌子布置成宴会。彩排发生地，浓酸从此处被取走。

visual.prompt: Traditional Chinese garden courtyard stage with draped table set as banquet, Greek tragedy props, 1914 Republican era, autumn desolation, oil painting style

name: 东院·男生住处
description: 男生住宿区，楚梦与斌持同屋。1908年悦绮送信笺目的地。

visual.prompt: Traditional Chinese garden east courtyard, male student quarters, 1914 Republican era, simple furnishings, oil painting style

name: 西院·女生住处
description: 女生住宿区，分北屋（宜湘/语桐）和南屋（晚弦/梢衣/悦绮）。宜湘被毒杀处。

visual.prompt: Traditional Chinese garden west courtyard, female student quarters, two rooms north and south, 1914 Republican era, oil painting style

name: 花园·竹林迷宫
description: 秋瑟园花园，竹林深处有亭子。无头尸体（臣柳）发现处，清岷被勒昏处。细绳沿竹林布置。

visual.prompt: Dense bamboo forest garden with pavilion at depth, rope strung along bamboo, 1914 Chinese garden, mysterious atmosphere, oil painting style

name: 北院·船首
description: 阿尔戈号船首实物舞台，装有雅典娜木雕船首像。绰元被杀处。

visual.prompt: Ancient Greek ship prow (Argo) replica in Chinese garden courtyard, wooden figurehead of Athena, 1914 Republican era, oil painting style

name: 仓库
description: 道具存放处，存放细绳、利刃、铜剑、大铁锅等。斌持和晚弦先后从此取走凶器。

visual.prompt: Traditional Chinese garden storage room, theatrical props scattered, ropes and blades visible, dim lighting, oil painting style

name: 厨房
description: 秋瑟园厨房，水缸和灶台。仰名被肢解处。语桐从此取水。

visual.prompt: Traditional Chinese kitchen with water vat and stove, 1914 Republican era, ominous atmosphere, oil painting style

name: 餐堂
description: 后院餐堂，社团聚餐处。1908年寒暄发生地。

visual.prompt: Traditional Chinese dining hall in garden, long wooden tables, 1914 Republican era, oil painting style

name: 前院·井
description: 秋瑟园前院，有水井。晚弦将血衣和粗绳扔入井中。

visual.prompt: Traditional Chinese garden front courtyard with old stone well, autumn leaves, 1914 Republican era, oil painting style

name: 后院·假山
description: 后院假山处，梢衣向楚梦表白之地。可望见中院湖面。

visual.prompt: Traditional Chinese garden rockery by lake, autumn scenery, 1914 Republican era, romantic yet ominous atmosphere, oil painting style

name: 中院·湖中亭
description: 中院湖泊，湖中有亭。1908年悦绮尸体被沉入此处，后箱子浮起。

visual.prompt: Chinese garden central lake with pavilion, lotus remnants, floating wooden box visible among debris, 1914 Republican era, oil painting style
